message:
test(server): add 12 HTTP dispatch error path tests (br-3h13.5.1)

Cover 404 (unknown paths), 401 (wrong/malformed bearer auth), 405
(POST to health/healthz/well-known), 501 (WebSocket upgrade on
ws-state), 503 (ws-input without TUI), and 500 (transport errors).
Also verify OPTIONS bypasses bearer auth when CORS is configured.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
